Item 7 — Management Discussion

This section presents management's discussion of financial condition and results of operations.

Capital Returns

The company returned $2.4 billion to shareholders during the fiscal year through dividends and repurchases.

Share Repurchases

Under the existing repurchase programme, 12 million shares were bought back at an average price of $85.50.

Dividends

The quarterly dividend was increased from $0.25 to $0.30 per share, effective Q3 2025.

Liquidity and Capital Resources

Operating cash flow for the period was $3.1 billion, compared to $2.7 billion in the prior year.

Item 8 — Financial Statements

The consolidated financial statements and supplementary data are presented below.
